channel.title: Russell Parrott | AI Accountability & Evidence
channel.description: Isolate algorithmic corporate liability. Evidentiary testing frameworks, books, and insights mapping 21st-century software to strict liability and human decision-making trails.

item.title: The DAREB Test
item.description: Evidentiary AI accountability framework and diagnostic testing.

item.title: Director Accountability Test
item.description: Evaluating human responsibility and corporate liability gaps in automated systems.

item.title: D&O Insurance and AI Liability Risk
item.description: How corporate accountability gaps impact Directors and Officers insurance coverage.

item.title: Forensic AI Audit Trail Requirements
item.description: Establishing evidence trails and human decision-making maps within software governance.

item.title: The PLD AI Disclosure and Evidence Trap
item.description: Analysing strict liability and corporate disclosure gaps under the Product Liability Directive.

item.title: Why AI Compliance Checklists Fail
item.description: The structural disconnect between standardised checklists and legal litigation environments.

item.title: Why AI Governance Frameworks Fail
item.description: Examining how systemic gaps in corporate structures drop individual responsibility.

item.title: When organisational protection stops protecting directors
item.description: Independent explanatory material on AI accountability and director liability. Examining what can be proven after automated and AI-assisted decisions are challenged under legal, regulatory and evidentiary scrutiny.
